member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Application.Abstractions.IApplicationLogger
member.summary: Application logging abstraction that avoids hard dependencies on concrete logging products.

member.summary: Writes an informational log entry.

member.summary: Writes a warning log entry.

member.name: M:EnterpriseTemplate.Application.Abstractions.IApplicationLogger.Error(System.Exception,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Writes an error log entry.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Application.Abstractions.ICacheService
member.summary: Cache abstraction implemented by memory and distributed cache adapters.

member.summary: Gets a cached value or creates it when missing.

member.summary: Removes a cached value.

member.name: T:EnterpriseTemplate.Application.Abstractions.ICurrentUserService
member.summary: Provides current request user context for auditing and authorization decisions.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Application.Abstractions.ICurrentUserService.UserId
member.summary: Gets the current user identifier when authenticated.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Application.Abstractions.ICurrentUserService.UserName
member.summary: Gets the current user display name when authenticated.

member.summary: Coordinates transactional persistence across repositories.

member.summary: Saves pending changes in a single transaction.

member.summary: Executes a function inside a database transaction.

member.summary: Determines whether the authenticated Identity user has the requested permission code through role membership.
